content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of NNN integers - [A1,A2,‚Ä¶,AN][A_1, A_2, \ldots, A_N][A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã].

For a positive integer XXX, consider the set SXS_XSX‚Äã defined as {Ai+j\{A_i + j{Ai‚Äã+j ‚à£|‚à£ 1‚â§i‚â§N,1‚â§j‚â§X}1 \le i \le N, 1 \le j \le X\}1‚â§i‚â§N,1‚â§j‚â§X}, i.e. the elements added in this set will be {A1+1,A1+2,‚Ä¶,A1+X,A2+1,A2+2,‚Ä¶,A2+X,‚Ä¶,AN+1,AN+2,‚Ä¶,AN+X}\{A_1 + 1, A_1 + 2, \ldots, A_1 + X, A_2 + 1, A_2 + 2, \ldots, A_2 + X, \ldots, A_N + 1, A_N + 2, \ldots, A_N + X\}{A1‚Äã+1,A1‚Äã+2,‚Ä¶,A1‚Äã+X,A2‚Äã+1,A2‚Äã+2,‚Ä¶,A2‚Äã+X,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã+1,AN‚Äã+2,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã+X}.

Then, we are interested in the value ‚à£SX‚à£|S_X|‚à£SX‚Äã‚à£, i.e. the number of distinct elements in this set.

You need to answer QQQ queries : given an integer XXX, find ‚à£SX‚à£|S_X|‚à£SX‚Äã‚à£.


Input Format

The first line contains 222 integers NNN and QQQ - the size of the array, and the number of queries.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã.
The next QQQ lines contain one integer each - XXX, representing a query.


Output Format
For each query, output ‚à£SX‚à£|S_X|‚à£SX‚Äã‚à£.

Explanation:
Query 1 : The set SXS_XSX‚Äã is {2,7,9}\{2, 7, 9\}{2,7,9}.
